narrative:
South Euclid City has 15,853 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 44.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 39.3 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +17.9% D−R vs +50.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
